text:
As we want it to feel more school-like, this is going to be the only farmable spot BUT! The Greenhouse is much more complex than it seems and is going to be upgradable in the future🍀

Different crops are going to require different elemental sprinklers. you’ll also be setting https://t.co/YWAJqik5LZ https://t.co/DjhVdzeux8
